title: Custom Deep Comparison Reports
context: Content, education, decision-making, and platform development
surface_question: What is the real difference between Custom Deep Comparison Reports and Method?
a_root: A distinct mechanism in the comparison.
b_root: A contrasting mechanism in the comparison.
hidden_similarity: Both belong to the comparison context.
hidden_difference: A good comparison does not pick blindly  It reveals conditions.
a_failure_mode: A fails when its mechanism loses fit, trust, context, or execution.
b_failure_mode: B fails when its mechanism loses fit, trust, context, or execution.
conditional_verdict: Use Custom Deep Comparison Reports when its conditions fit. Use Method when its conditions fit.
final_line: A good comparison does not pick blindly. It reveals conditions.
